calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Mandate Office Of Citizen Complaints To Disclose Public Records Under Government Code Section 6259;
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James A. Lassart of Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley, 543-4800, appearing for petitioner and moving party
Vince Chhabria of the Office of the City Attorney, 554-4674, appearing for respondent

Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MARK GAMBLE'S Petition To Mandate Office Of Citizen Complaints To Disclose Public Records Under Government Code Section 6259. Petition denied; fees denied to both sides. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/DS) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
